'''chamofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnium|pycnium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnium|pycnium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chamofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || chæmefeth || chæmefej || chæmefesh || chæmefe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || chamomofoth || chamomofoj || chamomofosh || chamomofo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || chamofoth || chamofoj || chamofosh || chamofo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || chamoffofth || chamoffofj || chamoffofsh || chamoffof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || chamofotho || chamofojo || chamofosho || chamofoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || chamofoth || chamofoj || chamofosh || chamofo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || chamofothol || chamofojol || chamofoshol || chamofokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || chamofoothotho || chamofoojojo || chamofooshosho || chamofooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || chamofothon || chamofojon || chamofoshon || chamofokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || chamofothooro || chamofojooro || chamofoshooro || chamofokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
